localized_texts.text: SplashMania at Gamuda Cove, Selangor

Where nature meets fun, and where you can spend the entire day splashing around under the sun! Experience the thrills and spills of a one-of-a-kind waterpark in SplashMania. Home to 39 exhilarating slides and attractions that cater to families, students, young working adults and thrill seekers of all kinds, this waterpark is located in Gamuda Cove, Selangor. Close proximity to KLIA and 30mins from KL City Centre.
SplashMania at Gamuda Cove in Selangor is a unique waterpark where nature meets fun.
It features first-of-its-kind attractions, award-winning water slides, and entertainment offerings.
Top Attractions: Wild Rush, Titanic Experience, Amazonia, Duf Mania, Ravage River, Zoomi's Runway, Sky Leap, Shaka Waka and Plung Swoosh.

Gear up for thrills and spills at SplashMania, Gamuda Cove's water wonderland! This action-packed park promises a day of drenched delight for all ages. With 39 exhilarating slides and attractions, there's something for every level of thrill-seeker.For the adrenaline junkies, heart-pounding rides like The Shaka Waka, a colossal looping water coaster, and The Wild Rush, a multi-rider raft adventure, promise an unforgettable rush. Take a plunge down the gravity-defying slides or race your friends on the twisting tubes.For a more relaxing experience, meander along the lazy river or unwind in the wave pool. Families can create lasting memories splashing around in the dedicated children's area, featuring age-appropriate slides, water jets, and fountains.The fun doesn't stop at the water! Take a break from the slides and challenge your friends to a game of mini golf or test your skills at the arcade. When hunger strikes, a variety of restaurants and cafes are available to satisfy your cravings.Soak up the sun, cool off in the refreshing water, and create a splash at SplashMania! This ultimate water park adventure is a perfect escape for a fun-filled day trip with family and friends.
Accessibility: Stroller and wheelchairs. These amenities are available to rent during your visit.
Accessibility: Place for mother to feeds their babies.  Have clear signages at the venue indicating where the area is made available.
Weather: For safety reasons, we must promptly evacuate the pool during heavy rain accompanied by lightning and thunderstorms.
Restriction: Those under 13 must always be accompanied by an adult.
Restriction: SplashMania visitors cannot bring any dangerous or illegal items into the premises.
What’s included: Standard Admission
How to use: Show Mobile Ticket: Ticketing counter
How to use: The ticket is valid on the selected visit date

Terms & Conditions: Tickets are valid for a fixed date only Multiple vouchers can be redeemed together in a single transaction. Each voucher is valid for one (1) time redemption only. The voucher is valid only on the same day of the visit. Any unused voucher after its validity period will be forfeited and not refunded. The voucher is non-transferable, non-refundable, and cannot be exchanged for cash or any other products or merchandise in the waterpark. If the voucher value in a single transaction is insufficient to cover the total cost, the voucher holder must pay the remaining balance. If the voucher value exceeds the total cost, any remaining amount will be forfeited and not refunded. SplashMania management reserves the right to vary and amend the terms and conditions at any time without prior notice. Guests must follow the general park rules and regulations for SplashMania, Gamuda Cove. FREE park admission applies only to children aged below 3 years with a paying adult. Valid documents such as NRIC, MyKid, I-Card, Passport, or Multiple Entry Visa will be required for verification purposes prior to park admission. Guests must adhere to all safety rules and regulations of the slides and rides irrespective of the ticket type. Guests with Disabilities (OKU): Guests with a disability certificate. Guests below the age of 12 must be accompanied at all times by an adult aged 18 and above. Outside food and drinks are strictly not allowed. Glass or any sharp or dangerous objects are strictly prohibited. No personal surfboards, body boards, or tubes are allowed. Guests are solely responsible for their own belongings. No refunds for inclement weather. No exchange, refund, replacement, and/or extension will be made under any circumstance(s). No cancellation will be accepted upon confirmation of purchase. Only approved swimwear is allowed. No exposed zippers, buckles, or rivets. Guests must use a tube or sliding mat to go on certain slides and attractions. Please read all ride signage and adhere accordingly. Queue up and wait for your turn to get onto slides or rides. Most rides have height and weight restrictions. Please read all ride restriction signage and adhere accordingly. CAUTION: Guests with any existing medical health condition or who have self-imposed restrictions on their physical activity, or who are overweight for their body type or under “doctor’s care” should not go on any rides or attractions. CAUTION: Certain attractions contain bright lighting effects that flash or strobe. Guests who are sensitive to these conditions or have a history of photosensitive epilepsy should avoid these attractions. Locker rental is available at your convenience. Please do not leave valuables unattended. Fighting and abusive language are strictly not permitted in SplashMania. Gamuda Land Leisure’s Management (“Management”) reserves the right to stop any picture-taking or video recording and confiscate any materials if deemed inappropriate. The Management will not be liable for any loss, injuries, or death. The Management reserves the right to deny admission or request a guest to leave the park due to infraction of the rules or if caught in unsafe, illegal, or offensive behavior. The Management reserves the right to change the operation hours, close any part of the park, restrict the number of visitors, cancel, or amend any activities without prior notice.
Cancellation Policy: No cancellation for this activity as per vendor policy
What’s included: [Limited Time Offer!] SplashMania
How to use: Show Mobile Ticket: SplashMania’s turnstile gate.
